entity.summary: Privacy-focused hybrid crypto trading exchange supporting leveraged BTC, ETH, and SOL markets, exchange-managed and self-managed signing modes, zk-verified settlement controls, subaccounts, vaults, and developer APIs.
entity.notes: HEI classifies Hibachi as hybrid because current first-party documentation supports both exchange-managed and self-managed key modes while using a zk-verified settlement layer. Current trading documentation covers leveraged BTC, ETH, and SOL markets, with additional order, margin, liquidation, funding, vault, and API resources.

evidence.title: About Hibachi
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Hibachi as a privacy-first exchange built for high-performance trading and describes the exchange mission and contributor background.

evidence.title: Hibachi Trading documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading documentation describes active BTC, ETH, and SOL markets, leverage, limits, pricing, fees, order types, margining, liquidations, subaccounts, funding, and insurance-fund resources.

evidence.title: Hibachi Key Management
evidence.notes: First-party key-management documentation describes both exchange-managed ECDSA/HMAC signing and self-managed wallet-derived account keys, supporting hybrid exchange classification.
